lines.text: Pools at Walt Disney World Swan Hotel | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Walt Disney World Swan Hotel
LocatedinWalt Disney World Swan HotelatEPCOT Resort Area
Bask in the beauty of the 3-acre grotto pool, 2 lap pools, a spring pool, 4 whirlpools and a kiddie pool. Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Fun in the Sun for the Entire Family
5 stunning pools provide Guests with an abundance of aquatic options.

Take the plunge in the grotto pool, a stunning 3-acre tropical oasis featuring lush greenery, waterfalls, rock caves, and a twisting waterslide. Enjoy a casual conversation among family and friends in the nearby spring pool, a haven for casual swimmers. Or experience a more competitive workout in one of the 2 lap pools.
A total of 4 whirlpool spas promise a rejuvenating retreat for adults looking to unwind. A white-sand beach completes the illusion of an island getaway.

For Guests looking for a cool beverage or a delicious snack, 2 poolside restaurants are located in the expansive pool complex. Nearby at the Cabana Beach Hut, pool essentials—including tube and rafts—are available for rent.
